global.description: The ad features a bold headline and a call to action with abstract graphic elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream and start for free.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes in a muted color palette.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: Another central graphic element with a larger rectangular shape, possibly representing content or a feature.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element positioned at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Stream the hype Start free today' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype Start free today

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'StarVault' is displayed in a large, bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner of the ad.
